channel.title: VoiceLogPro
channel.description: Daily construction reports from voice notes — turn spoken updates into structured daily logs, photo annotations, and compliance-ready reports in minutes. Built for construction crews, site managers, and contractors.

item.title: VoiceLogPro | Daily Construction Reports from Voice Notes
item.description: Turn voice notes into court-ready daily construction reports with timestamps, weather, and photos. Built for subcontractors who work with their hands.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: About VoiceLogPro
item.description: About VoiceLogPro: Voice-to-PDF Construction Daily Reports. Built for General contractors, electricians, plumbers, HVAC contractors, roofers, subcontractors.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: FAQ — VoiceLogPro
item.description: Frequently asked questions about VoiceLogPro.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: Free Construction Tools | VoiceLogPro
item.description: Free tools for subcontractors: lien deadline calculator, time tracking, weather logger, and daily report generator.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: Daily Construction Reports by Trade | VoiceLogPro
item.description: Turn voice notes into court-ready daily construction reports with timestamps, weather, and photos. Built for subcontractors who work with their hands.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: Best Of — VoiceLogPro
item.description: 5 OSHA-compliant templates, Texas Chapter 53 checklist, and dispute defense swipe file. Free PDF.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: VoiceLogPro vs 8 Transcription Tools: Alternatives Compared
item.description: Side-by-side comparisons of VoiceLogPro and 8 transcription tools — Otter.ai, Rev, Descript, Trint, Sonix, Fireflies.ai, Temi, and Happy Scribe — covering features, pricing, and limitations.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: Voice Logging & Transcription Glossary — VoiceLogPro
item.description: Plain-language definitions of 7 voice documentation terms: voice logging, transcription, speaker diarization, speech-to-text, audio archive, compliance logging, and real-time transcription.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: Weekly Construction Report Templates | VoiceLogPro
item.description: Free weekly report templates for every trade. Compiled automatically from daily voice notes.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: Vs — VoiceLogPro
item.description: Detailed comparisons: VoiceLogPro vs other tools.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: Free Construction Tools | VoiceLogPro
item.description: Free tools for construction subcontractors: lien deadline calculator, daily report templates, and more. Built by VoiceLogPro.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: Daily Construction Report Templates by Trade | VoiceLogPro
item.description: Free daily construction report templates for electricians, plumbers, HVAC, roofers, general contractors, and more. VoiceLogPro fills these automatically from your voice note.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro

item.title: State Mechanics Lien Law Guides | VoiceLogPro
item.description: State-by-state mechanics lien law guides for subcontractors. Preliminary notice deadlines, lien filing windows, and enforcement periods. Protect your payment rights.
item.dc:creator: VoiceLogPro
